feature_list.test_description: Verify the core supports direct I2C normal-mode operation at 100 Kbps.
feature_list.test_constraints: Implemented configuration supporting 100 Kbps mode; SCL and SDA available.
test_steps: Configure the core for 100 Kbps operation.
Initiate an I2C transfer on SCL and SDA.
expected_results: The transfer operates at 100 Kbps normal-mode.
SCL and SDA activity matches direct 100 Kbps operation.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can directly support 100 Kbps normal-mode I2C operation, where implemented.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Normal: 100Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core supports I2C fast-mode operation at 400 Kbps.
feature_list.test_constraints: Correct hardware included for 400 Kbps mode; SCL and SDA available.
test_steps: Configure the core for 400 Kbps operation.
Initiate an I2C transfer on SCL and SDA.
expected_results: The transfer operates at 400 Kbps fast-mode.
SCL and SDA activity matches 400 Kbps operation.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can support 400 Kbps fast-mode I2C operation, where correct hardware is included.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Fast: 400Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant Classic interface signal set.
test_steps: Inspect or exercise the WISHBONE interface ports during a bus access.
Verify use of wb_clk_i, wb_rst_i, wb_adr_i, wb_dat_i, wb_dat_o, wb_we_i, wb_stb_i, wb_cyc_i, wb_ack_o, and wb_inta_o.
expected_results: The WISHBONE Classic interface signals are present and used for bus transactions.
The interface behavior is consistent with a WISHBONE Classic connection at a high level.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core shall implement a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
feature_list.requirement_text: The core features a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.

feature_list.test_description: Verify each WISHBONE access completes in two clock cycles.
feature_list.test_constraints: WISHBONE access initiated with wb_cyc_i and wb_stb_i.
test_steps: Start a WISHBONE access on a rising wb_clk_i edge with wb_cyc_i and wb_stb_i asserted.
Count clock cycles until wb_ack_o is asserted.
expected_results: wb_ack_o is asserted on the second clock cycle of the access.
The access duration is two clock cycles.
feature_list.requirement_description: Each WISHBONE access must take two clock cycles.

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset operates when configured as active high.
test_steps: Assert arst_i high and observe reset behavior.
expected_results: The core enters reset when arst_i is high.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset operates when configured as active low.
test_steps: Assert arst_i low and observe reset behavior.
expected_results: The core enters reset when arst_i is low.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals.
test_steps: Inspect or connect the external SCL interface signals.
Verify presence and functional use of scl_pad_i, scl_pad_o, and scl_pad_oe.
expected_results: SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed.
The SCL external connection supports open-drain style interfacing at the signal level.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals.
test_steps: Inspect or connect the external SDA interface signals.
Verify presence and functional use of sda_pad_i, sda_pad_o, and sda_pad_oe.
expected_results: SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed.
The SDA external connection supports open-drain style interfacing at the signal level.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable
